CommunityApplications.Profile:
RifleJock's Unraid Community Apps repository.
**Plugins** - Storage Guard — free-space thresholds for array and pools; colors Main free bars and optional Unraid alerts.
**Docker** - resonite-headless — Resonite VR headless server (SteamCMD / shadowpanther image) - neos-headless — Legacy Neos VR headless (kept for older setups)
Support: forum threads linked on each app. Plugin source for Storage Guard is at https://github.com/ibigsnet/StorageGuard
